title: elaphrium fragile
intro: Elaphrium fragile, also known as Elaphrium fragrans or Elaphrium, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Elaphrium fragile include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and reduce fever. Elaphrium fragile can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
